title: PlayerList
description: A lightweight and modern plugin for customizing playerlist.
body:
![Banner](https://github.com/fabianmakila/playerlist/blob/main/assets/playerlist-banner.svg?raw=true)

# PlayerList

A lightweight and modern plugin for customizing the playerlist.

## Feature overview
- Header and footer customization
- Sorting
- MiniMessage and MiniPlaceholders support

## MiniMessage and MiniPlaceholders
PlayerList supports MiniMessage out of the box. However to fully utilize the plugin it is recommended to be used alongside MiniPlaceholders as the plugin does not have any built in placeholders.

## Sorting
PlayerList has multiple built in sorting options such as Placeholder and LuckPerms based sorters. More info on how to use these is in the wiki.
